metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for automated dev loops with Codex review gates.

plugins.name: ccx
plugins.description: Automated dev loops with Codex review gates. Provides /ccx:loop, /ccx:forever, /ccx:supervisor (parallel worker orchestrator), /ccx:plan (seeds BOARD.md task rows from a prompt or document), and an optional Discord chat bridge (/ccx:chat-setup + --chat).
